prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Pods are evicted with reason 'memory pressure'. Find the Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that (1) define the memory pressure eviction thresholds and (2) implement the eviction manager's decision logic for memory-pressure-based pod eviction.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Pods are evicted with reason 'memory pressure'. Find the Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that (1) define the memory pressure eviction thresholds and (2) implement the eviction manager's decision logic for memory-pressure-based pod eviction.
